data.title: Create RED test suite: test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh with 5 failing tests and .test-index entries
data.description: Create tests/docs/test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh with 5 test functions in declaration order: test_blindspot_in_deep_hygiene, test_blindspot_in_deep_correctness, test_blindspot_in_deep_arch, test_blindspot_in_standard, test_blindspot_in_light. Sources tests/lib/assert.sh. Dispatch block calls print_summary (not exit $?). print_summary is last line. Each function creates own TMPDIR, runs build-review-agents.sh --output TMPDIR, checks agent file for ## AI Blindspot Annotations section header via assert_eq. Add 5 separate .test-index entries with RED marker [test_blindspot_in_deep_hygiene] on deep-hygiene entry only. testing_mode: RED.
